ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Pineapple, in pineapple juice, canned, drained

ingredients_text: 30% Dried Sweetened Cranberries (Cranberries, Pineapple Juice from Concentrate, Sunflower Oil), 24% Flame Raisins (Raisins, Sunflower Oil), 24% Golden Raisins (Raisins, Sunflower Oil, Preservative: _Sulphur Dioxide_), 6% Dried Inca Berries, 6% Dried Bing Cheries, 6% Dried Tart Cherries, 4% Dried Sweetened Blueberries (Blueberries, Sugar, Sunflower Oil).
